name: crime-data-viz
description: Crime data as one living field of luminous points — real Western Cape crime (2008–2023) on a reusable WebGL point-field engine: a province overview you drill into Cape Town from, with year-scrub, 3-crime flip, pie/compare, per-capita, and a Cape Town terrain relief.

scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx --yes gh-pages -d dist -t -m deploy
